metadata.description: TMB plugin marketplace — DEV channel. Tracks trustmybot/plugin's `dev` branch (bleeding edge; faster than rc, less polished). Sibling channel to `trustmybot` (stable, main) and `trustmybot-rc` (release candidates). Pattern is reusable — any developer can fork this catalog and change `ref` to their own plugin branch.

plugins.name: tmb
plugins.description: TMB plugin — DEV channel. Tracks the `dev` branch — what's about to ship in the next rc. Installs as `tmb` (same as the released plugin); disable the released `tmb` first.
